commands.name: feed-settings
commands.description:
Read or modify feed settings stored in sleet.settings.json for
the feed.

options.name: --config
options.description:
sleet.json file to read sources and settings from. Specify
'none' to avoid loading.

options.name: --source
options.description: Source name from sleet.json.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Write out additional messages for verbose output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --unset-all
options.description: Clear all feed settings.

options.name: --unset
options.description: Remove a feed setting. May be specified multiple times.

options.name: --set
options.description:
Add a feed setting. Value must be in the form {key}:{value} May
be specified multiple times.

options.name: --get
options.description: Display a feed setting. May be specified multiple times.

options.name: --get-all
options.description: Diplay all feed settings.

options.name: --property
options.description:
Define a key=value pair. Used for tokenized sleet.json files or
env var values.

may be used to fix feed problems or to upgrade between Sleet

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Write out additional messages for verbose output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --stable
options.description:
Number of stable versions per package id. If not specified
the feed settings will be used.

options.name: --prerelease
options.description:
Number of prerelease versions per package id. If not
specified the feed settings will be used.

options.name: --release-labels
options.description:
Group prerelease packages by the first X release labels.
Each group will be pruned to the prerelease max if applied.
(optional)

options.name: --package
options.description: Prune only the given package ids

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Print out all versions that would be deleted without
actually removing them.

options.name: --property
options.description:
Define a key=value pair. Used for tokenized sleet.json files
or env var values.

commands.name: settings
commands.description:
